<div class="relative min-w-0 flex-1 break-anywhere py-8 layout-wide:no-sidebar:lg:max-xl:pb-20 @container max-w-3xl layout-wide:max-w-6xl mx-auto w-full page-has-toc layout-default" role="main">

<div class="sr-only">

For the complete documentation index, see [llms.txt](https://documentation.alluxio.io/os-en/llms.txt). This page is also available as [Markdown](https://documentation.alluxio.io/os-en/overview.md).

</div>

<div class="max-w-3xl layout-wide:max-w-6xl mx-auto w-full mb-6 space-y-3 after:clear-both after:block">

<div class="float-right ml-4 flex gap-2 -mt-3 xs:mt-2">

<div class="flex h-fit items-stretch justify-start overflow-hidden *:translate-y-0! *:shadow-none! [&>*:not(:first-child)]:border-l-0 [&>*:not(:first-child,:last-child)]:rounded-none! [&>*:not(:only-child):first-child]:rounded-r-none [&>*:not(:only-child):last-child]:rounded-l-none">

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="gb-icon group-data-[state=open]/dropdown:rotate-180 group-open:rotate-180 size-3 transition-all button-leading-icon shrink-0 my-text-1/8 size-text-base mx-text-1/8 size-text-sm" />

</div>

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="gb-icon button-leading-icon shrink-0 my-text-1/8 size-text-base" /><span class="button-content truncate">On this page</span>

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="gb-icon button-leading-icon shrink-0 my-text-1/8 size-text-base mx-text-1/8" />

</div>

# Introduction

</div>

<div class="contents" content-ref-root="">

<div class="flex flex-col [&>*+*]:mt-5 whitespace-pre-wrap">

## 

<div class="relative hash grid grid-area-1-1 h-[1em] border-0 opacity-0 site-background rounded group-hover/hash:opacity-[0] group-focus/hash:opacity-[0] md:group-hover/hash:opacity-[1] md:group-focus/hash:opacity-[1] -ml-6 self-center pr-2 [.flip-heading-hash_&]:order-last [.flip-heading-hash_&]:ml-1 [.flip-heading-hash_&]:pl-2">

<a href="#what-is-alluxio" class="inline-flex h-full items-start leading-tight" aria-label="Direct link to heading"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="gb-icon self-center transition-colors text-transparent group-hover/hash:text-tint-subtle contrast-more:group-hover/hash:text-tint-strong size-4" /></a>

</div>

<div class="flex-1 z-1 justify-self-start max-w-full break-words text-start self-start justify-start leading-tight">

What is Alluxio

</div>

Alluxio is world's first open source <span state="closed"><a href="https://www.alluxio.io/blog/data-orchestration-the-missing-piece-in-the-data-world/" class="underline decoration-[max(0.07em,1px)] underline-offset-2 links-accent:underline-offset-4 links-default:decoration-primary/6 links-default:text-primary-subtle hover:links-default:text-primary-strong contrast-more:links-default:text-primary contrast-more:hover:links-default:text-primary-strong links-accent:decoration-primary-subtle hover:links-accent:decoration-[3px] hover:links-accent:[text-decoration-skip-ink:none] transition-all duration-100">data orchestration technology<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="gb-icon ml-0.5 inline size-3 links-accent:text-tint-subtle" /></a></span> for analytics and AI for the cloud. It bridges the gap between data driven applications and storage systems, bringing data from the storage tier closer to the data driven applications and makes it easily accessible enabling applications to connect to numerous storage systems through a common interface. Alluxio’s memory-first tiered architecture enables data access at speeds orders of magnitude faster than existing solutions.

In the data ecosystem, Alluxio lies between data driven applications, such as Apache Spark, Presto, Tensorflow, Apache HBase, Apache Hive, or Apache Flink, and various persistent storage systems, such as Amazon S3, Google Cloud Storage, OpenStack Swift, HDFS, IBM Cleversafe, EMC ECS, Ceph, NFS, Minio, and Alibaba OSS. Alluxio unifies the data stored in these different storage systems, presenting unified client APIs and a global namespace to its upper layer data driven applications.

The Alluxio project originated from <span state="closed"><a href="https://amplab.cs.berkeley.edu/software/" class="underline decoration-[max(0.07em,1px)] underline-offset-2 links-accent:underline-offset-4 links-default:decoration-primary/6 links-default:text-primary-subtle hover:links-default:text-primary-strong contrast-more:links-default:text-primary contrast-more:hover:links-default:text-primary-strong links-accent:decoration-primary-subtle hover:links-accent:decoration-[3px] hover:links-accent:[text-decoration-skip-ink:none] transition-all duration-100">the UC Berkeley AMPLab<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="gb-icon ml-0.5 inline size-3 links-accent:text-tint-subtle" /></a></span> (see <span state="closed"><a href="https://www2.eecs.berkeley.edu/Pubs/TechRpts/2018/EECS-2018-29.html" class="underline decoration-[max(0.07em,1px)] underline-offset-2 links-accent:underline-offset-4 links-default:decoration-primary/6 links-default:text-primary-subtle hover:links-default:text-primary-strong contrast-more:links-default:text-primary contrast-more:hover:links-default:text-primary-strong links-accent:decoration-primary-subtle hover:links-accent:decoration-[3px] hover:links-accent:[text-decoration-skip-ink:none] transition-all duration-100">papers<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="gb-icon ml-0.5 inline size-3 links-accent:text-tint-subtle" /></a></span>) as the data access layer of the Berkeley Data Analytics Stack (<span state="closed"><a href="https://amplab.cs.berkeley.edu/bdas/" class="underline decoration-[max(0.07em,1px)] underline-offset-2 links-accent:underline-offset-4 links-default:decoration-primary/6 links-default:text-primary-subtle hover:links-default:text-primary-strong contrast-more:links-default:text-primary contrast-more:hover:links-default:text-primary-strong links-accent:decoration-primary-subtle hover:links-accent:decoration-[3px] hover:links-accent:[text-decoration-skip-ink:none] transition-all duration-100">BDAS<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="gb-icon ml-0.5 inline size-3 links-accent:text-tint-subtle" /></a></span>). It is open source under <span state="closed"><a href="https://github.com/alluxio/alluxio/blob/master/LICENSE" class="underline decoration-[max(0.07em,1px)] underline-offset-2 links-accent:underline-offset-4 links-default:decoration-primary/6 links-default:text-primary-subtle hover:links-default:text-primary-strong contrast-more:links-default:text-primary contrast-more:hover:links-default:text-primary-strong links-accent:decoration-primary-subtle hover:links-accent:decoration-[3px] hover:links-accent:[text-decoration-skip-ink:none] transition-all duration-100">Apache License 2.0<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="gb-icon ml-0.5 inline size-3 links-accent:text-tint-subtle" /></a></span>. Alluxio is one of the fastest growing open source projects that has attracted more than <span state="closed"><a href="https://github.com/alluxio/alluxio/graphs/contributors" class="underline decoration-[max(0.07em,1px)] underline-offset-2 links-accent:underline-offset-4 links-default:decoration-primary/6 links-default:text-primary-subtle hover:links-default:text-primary-strong contrast-more:links-default:text-primary contrast-more:hover:links-default:text-primary-strong links-accent:decoration-primary-subtle hover:links-accent:decoration-[3px] hover:links-accent:[text-decoration-skip-ink:none] transition-all duration-100">1000 contributors<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="gb-icon ml-0.5 inline size-3 links-accent:text-tint-subtle" /></a></span> from over 300 institutions including Alibaba, Alluxio, Baidu, CMU, Google, IBM, Intel, NJU, Red Hat, Tencent, UC Berkeley, and Yahoo.

Today, Alluxio is deployed in production by <span state="closed"><a href="https://www.alluxio.io/powered-by-alluxio" class="underline decoration-[max(0.07em,1px)] underline-offset-2 links-accent:underline-offset-4 links-default:decoration-primary/6 links-default:text-primary-subtle hover:links-default:text-primary-strong contrast-more:links-default:text-primary contrast-more:hover:links-default:text-primary-strong links-accent:decoration-primary-subtle hover:links-accent:decoration-[3px] hover:links-accent:[text-decoration-skip-ink:none] transition-all duration-100">hundreds of organizations<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="gb-icon ml-0.5 inline size-3 links-accent:text-tint-subtle" /></a></span> with the largest deployment exceeding 1,500 nodes.

## 

<div class="relative hash grid grid-area-1-1 h-[1em] border-0 opacity-0 site-background rounded group-hover/hash:opacity-[0] group-focus/hash:opacity-[0] md:group-hover/hash:opacity-[1] md:group-focus/hash:opacity-[1] -ml-6 self-center pr-2 [.flip-heading-hash_&]:order-last [.flip-heading-hash_&]:ml-1 [.flip-heading-hash_&]:pl-2">

<a href="#benefits" class="inline-flex h-full items-start leading-tight" aria-label="Direct link to heading"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="gb-icon self-center transition-colors text-transparent group-hover/hash:text-tint-subtle contrast-more:group-hover/hash:text-tint-strong size-4" /></a>

</div>

<div class="flex-1 z-1 justify-self-start max-w-full break-words text-start self-start justify-start leading-tight">

Benefits

</div>

Alluxio helps overcome the obstacles in extracting insight from data by simplifying how applications access their data, regardless of format or location. The benefits of Alluxio include:

- <div class="text-base leading-normal mr-1 flex min-h-lh min-w-6 items-center justify-center text-tint">

  <div class="before:font-var before:content-(--pseudoBefore--content)" style="--pseudoBefore--content:'•';--font-family:Arial;font-size:min(1.5em, 24px);line-height:1">

  </div>

  </div>

  <div class="flex min-w-0 flex-1 flex-col space-y-2">

  **Memory-Speed I/O**: Alluxio can be used as a distributed shared caching service so compute applications talking to Alluxio can transparently cache frequently accessed data, especially from remote locations, to provide in-memory I/O throughput. In addition, Alluxio's tiered storage which can leverage both memory and disk (SSD/HDD) makes elastically scaling data-driven applications cost effective.

  </div>

- <div class="text-base leading-normal mr-1 flex min-h-lh min-w-6 items-center justify-center text-tint">

  <div class="before:font-var before:content-(--pseudoBefore--content)" style="--pseudoBefore--content:'•';--font-family:Arial;font-size:min(1.5em, 24px);line-height:1">

  </div>

  </div>

  <div class="flex min-w-0 flex-1 flex-col space-y-2">

  **Simplified Cloud and Object Storage Adoption**: Cloud and object storage systems use different semantics that have performance implications compared to traditional file systems. Common file system operations such as directory listing and renaming often incur significant performance overhead. When accessing data in cloud storage, applications have no node-level locality or cross-application caching. Deploying Alluxio with cloud or object storage mitigates these problems by serving data from Alluxio instead of the underlying cloud or object storage.

  </div>

- <div class="text-base leading-normal mr-1 flex min-h-lh min-w-6 items-center justify-center text-tint">

  <div class="before:font-var before:content-(--pseudoBefore--content)" style="--pseudoBefore--content:'•';--font-family:Arial;font-size:min(1.5em, 24px);line-height:1">

  </div>

  </div>

  <div class="flex min-w-0 flex-1 flex-col space-y-2">

  **Simplified Data Management**: Alluxio provides a single point of access to multiple data sources. In addition to connecting data sources of different types, Alluxio also enables users to simultaneously connect to different versions of the same storage system, such as multiple versions of HDFS, without complex system configuration and management.

  </div>

- <div class="text-base leading-normal mr-1 flex min-h-lh min-w-6 items-center justify-center text-tint">

  <div class="before:font-var before:content-(--pseudoBefore--content)" style="--pseudoBefore--content:'•';--font-family:Arial;font-size:min(1.5em, 24px);line-height:1">

  </div>

  </div>

  <div class="flex min-w-0 flex-1 flex-col space-y-2">

  **Easy Application Deployment**: Alluxio manages communication between applications and file or object storages, translating data access requests from applications into underlying storage interfaces. Alluxio is Hadoop compatible. Existing data analytics applications, such as Spark and MapReduce programs, can run on top of Alluxio without any code changes.

  </div>

## 

<div class="relative hash grid grid-area-1-1 h-[1em] border-0 opacity-0 site-background rounded group-hover/hash:opacity-[0] group-focus/hash:opacity-[0] md:group-hover/hash:opacity-[1] md:group-focus/hash:opacity-[1] -ml-6 self-center pr-2 [.flip-heading-hash_&]:order-last [.flip-heading-hash_&]:ml-1 [.flip-heading-hash_&]:pl-2">

<a href="#technical-innovations" class="inline-flex h-full items-start leading-tight" aria-label="Direct link to heading"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="gb-icon self-center transition-colors text-transparent group-hover/hash:text-tint-subtle contrast-more:group-hover/hash:text-tint-strong size-4" /></a>

</div>

<div class="flex-1 z-1 justify-self-start max-w-full break-words text-start self-start justify-start leading-tight">

Technical Innovations

</div>

Alluxio brings three key areas of innovation together to provide a unique set of capabilities.

1.  <div class="text-base leading-normal mr-1 flex min-h-lh min-w-6 items-center justify-center text-tint">

    <div class="before:font-var before:content-(--pseudoBefore--content)" style="--pseudoBefore--content:'1.';--font-family:inherit;font-size:min(1em, 24px)">

    </div>

    </div>

    <div class="flex min-w-0 flex-1 flex-col space-y-2">

    **Global Namespace**: Alluxio serves as a single point of access to multiple independent storage systems regardless of physical location. This provides a unified view of all data sources and a standard interface for applications. See <span state="closed"><a href="/os-en/core-services/unified-namespace" class="underline decoration-[max(0.07em,1px)] underline-offset-2 links-accent:underline-offset-4 links-default:decoration-primary/6 links-default:text-primary-subtle hover:links-default:text-primary-strong contrast-more:links-default:text-primary contrast-more:hover:links-default:text-primary-strong links-accent:decoration-primary-subtle hover:links-accent:decoration-[3px] hover:links-accent:[text-decoration-skip-ink:none] transition-all duration-100">Namespace Management</a></span> for more details.

    </div>

2.  <div class="text-base leading-normal mr-1 flex min-h-lh min-w-6 items-center justify-center text-tint">

    <div class="before:font-var before:content-(--pseudoBefore--content)" style="--pseudoBefore--content:'2.';--font-family:inherit;font-size:min(1em, 24px)">

    </div>

    </div>

    <div class="flex min-w-0 flex-1 flex-col space-y-2">

    **Intelligent Multi-tiering Caching**: Alluxio clusters act as a read and write cache for data in connected storage systems. Configurable policies automatically optimize data placement for performance and reliability across both memory and disk (SSD/HDD). Caching is transparent to the user and uses buffering to maintain consistency with persistent storage. See <span state="closed"><a href="/os-en/core-services/caching" class="underline decoration-[max(0.07em,1px)] underline-offset-2 links-accent:underline-offset-4 links-default:decoration-primary/6 links-default:text-primary-subtle hover:links-default:text-primary-strong contrast-more:links-default:text-primary contrast-more:hover:links-default:text-primary-strong links-accent:decoration-primary-subtle hover:links-accent:decoration-[3px] hover:links-accent:[text-decoration-skip-ink:none] transition-all duration-100">Alluxio Storage Management</a></span> for more details.

    </div>

3.  <div class="text-base leading-normal mr-1 flex min-h-lh min-w-6 items-center justify-center text-tint">

    <div class="before:font-var before:content-(--pseudoBefore--content)" style="--pseudoBefore--content:'3.';--font-family:inherit;font-size:min(1em, 24px)">

    </div>

    </div>

    <div class="flex min-w-0 flex-1 flex-col space-y-2">

    **Server-Side API Translation**: Alluxio supports industry common APIs, such as HDFS API, S3 API, FUSE API, REST API. It transparently converts from a standard client-side interface to any storage interface. Alluxio manages communication between applications and file or object storage, eliminating the need for complex system configuration and management. File data can look like object data and vice versa.

    </div>

To understand more details on Alluxio internals, please read <span state="closed"><a href="/os-en/overview-1/architecture" class="underline decoration-[max(0.07em,1px)] underline-offset-2 links-accent:underline-offset-4 links-default:decoration-primary/6 links-default:text-primary-subtle hover:links-default:text-primary-strong contrast-more:links-default:text-primary contrast-more:hover:links-default:text-primary-strong links-accent:decoration-primary-subtle hover:links-accent:decoration-[3px] hover:links-accent:[text-decoration-skip-ink:none] transition-all duration-100">Alluxio architecture and data flow</a></span>.

## 

<div class="relative hash grid grid-area-1-1 h-[1em] border-0 opacity-0 site-background rounded group-hover/hash:opacity-[0] group-focus/hash:opacity-[0] md:group-hover/hash:opacity-[1] md:group-focus/hash:opacity-[1] -ml-6 self-center pr-2 [.flip-heading-hash_&]:order-last [.flip-heading-hash_&]:ml-1 [.flip-heading-hash_&]:pl-2">

<a href="#getting-started" class="inline-flex h-full items-start leading-tight" aria-label="Direct link to heading"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="gb-icon self-center transition-colors text-transparent group-hover/hash:text-tint-subtle contrast-more:group-hover/hash:text-tint-strong size-4" /></a>

</div>

<div class="flex-1 z-1 justify-self-start max-w-full break-words text-start self-start justify-start leading-tight">

Getting Started

</div>

To quickly get Alluxio up and running, take a look at our <span state="closed"><a href="/os-en/overview-1/getting-started" class="underline decoration-[max(0.07em,1px)] underline-offset-2 links-accent:underline-offset-4 links-default:decoration-primary/6 links-default:text-primary-subtle hover:links-default:text-primary-strong contrast-more:links-default:text-primary contrast-more:hover:links-default:text-primary-strong links-accent:decoration-primary-subtle hover:links-accent:decoration-[3px] hover:links-accent:[text-decoration-skip-ink:none] transition-all duration-100">Getting Started</a></span> page, which explains how to deploy Alluxio and run examples in a local environment.

## 

<div class="relative hash grid grid-area-1-1 h-[1em] border-0 opacity-0 site-background rounded group-hover/hash:opacity-[0] group-focus/hash:opacity-[0] md:group-hover/hash:opacity-[1] md:group-focus/hash:opacity-[1] -ml-6 self-center pr-2 [.flip-heading-hash_&]:order-last [.flip-heading-hash_&]:ml-1 [.flip-heading-hash_&]:pl-2">

<a href="#downloads-and-useful-resources" class="inline-flex h-full items-start leading-tight" aria-label="Direct link to heading"><img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="gb-icon self-center transition-colors text-transparent group-hover/hash:text-tint-subtle contrast-more:group-hover/hash:text-tint-strong size-4" /></a>

</div>

<div class="flex-1 z-1 justify-self-start max-w-full break-words text-start self-start justify-start leading-tight">

Downloads and Useful Resources

</div>

Released versions of Alluxio are available from the <span state="closed"><a href="https://alluxio.io/download" class="underline decoration-[max(0.07em,1px)] underline-offset-2 links-accent:underline-offset-4 links-default:decoration-primary/6 links-default:text-primary-subtle hover:links-default:text-primary-strong contrast-more:links-default:text-primary contrast-more:hover:links-default:text-primary-strong links-accent:decoration-primary-subtle hover:links-accent:decoration-[3px] hover:links-accent:[text-decoration-skip-ink:none] transition-all duration-100">Project Downloads Page<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="gb-icon ml-0.5 inline size-3 links-accent:text-tint-subtle" /></a></span>. Each release comes with prebuilt binaries compatible with various Hadoop versions. <span state="closed"><a href="/os-en/contributor/building-alluxio-from-source" class="underline decoration-[max(0.07em,1px)] underline-offset-2 links-accent:underline-offset-4 links-default:decoration-primary/6 links-default:text-primary-subtle hover:links-default:text-primary-strong contrast-more:links-default:text-primary contrast-more:hover:links-default:text-primary-strong links-accent:decoration-primary-subtle hover:links-accent:decoration-[3px] hover:links-accent:[text-decoration-skip-ink:none] transition-all duration-100">Building From Master Branch Documentation</a></span> explains how to build the project from source code. Questions can be directed to our <span state="closed"><a href="https://groups.google.com/forum/?fromgroups#!forum/alluxio-users" class="underline decoration-[max(0.07em,1px)] underline-offset-2 links-accent:underline-offset-4 links-default:decoration-primary/6 links-default:text-primary-subtle hover:links-default:text-primary-strong contrast-more:links-default:text-primary contrast-more:hover:links-default:text-primary-strong links-accent:decoration-primary-subtle hover:links-accent:decoration-[3px] hover:links-accent:[text-decoration-skip-ink:none] transition-all duration-100">User Mailing List<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="gb-icon ml-0.5 inline size-3 links-accent:text-tint-subtle" /></a></span> or our <span state="closed"><a href="https://alluxio.io/slack" class="underline decoration-[max(0.07em,1px)] underline-offset-2 links-accent:underline-offset-4 links-default:decoration-primary/6 links-default:text-primary-subtle hover:links-default:text-primary-strong contrast-more:links-default:text-primary contrast-more:hover:links-default:text-primary-strong links-accent:decoration-primary-subtle hover:links-accent:decoration-[3px] hover:links-accent:[text-decoration-skip-ink:none] transition-all duration-100">Community Slack Channel<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="gb-icon ml-0.5 inline size-3 links-accent:text-tint-subtle" /></a></span>.

<span state="closed"><a href="https://www.alluxio.io/download/" class="underline decoration-[max(0.07em,1px)] underline-offset-2 links-accent:underline-offset-4 links-default:decoration-primary/6 duration-100">Issue Tracking<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," class="gb-icon ml-0.5 inline size-3 links-accent:text-tint-subtle" /></a></span> \| <span state="closed"><a href="https://slackin.alluxio.io" class="underline decoration-[max(0.07em,1px)] underline-offset-2 links-accent:underline-offset-4 links-default:decoration-primary/6 links-default:text-primary-subtle hover:links-default:text-primary-strong contrast-more:links-default:text-primary contrast-more:hover:links-default:text-primary-strong links-accent:decoration-primary-subtle
